top_findings.title: Brand Inconsistency (GG Nexus)
top_findings.description: Titles in 4 major articles end with '| GG Nexus' instead of '| Gaming07'.
top_findings.recommendation: Replace '| GG Nexus' with '| Gaming07' in all article titles.

top_findings.title: Missing Canonical Tags on Original Articles
top_findings.description: 6 original articles do not have canonical tags, risking duplicate content indexation.
top_findings.recommendation: Add canonical links targeting the extensionless URLs of each page.

top_findings.title: Missing JSON-LD and OG Tags on Original Articles
top_findings.description: 6 original articles are missing BlogPosting JSON-LD schemas and Open Graph meta tags.
top_findings.recommendation: Inject structured JSON-LD and OG tags to match the new guide standards.

quick_wins.title: Inject missing canonicals
quick_wins.description: Ensure self-referencing canonical links exist on all articles.

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: robots.txt configured with sitemap references and admin disallows
sitemap.xml created and fully valid containing all extensionless URLs
HTTPS enforced with clean redirects in .htaccess

findings.title: Missing Canonical Tags
findings.description: 6 older articles are missing self-referencing canonical links.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Descriptive heading structures (H1-H6) matching game queries

findings.title: Outdated Branding in Titles
findings.description: 4 articles end with '| GG Nexus' branding.
findings.recommendation: Update titles to end with '| Gaming07'.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: Valid JSON-LD on homepage and newly created guides
Integrated FAQPage schema matching visible FAQ content on the NTE guide

findings.title: Missing JSON-LD on Original Articles
findings.description: Original reviews (e.g. Raid, NTE Review, Once Human Review) lack BlogPosting schema.
findings.recommendation: Inject custom JSON-LD graphs for the 6 original articles.

phases.name: Phase 1: Brand & On-Page Corrections
items: Replace all '| GG Nexus' title tags with '| Gaming07' on 4 original articles
Add canonical links to the 6 original articles

phases.name: Phase 2: Metadata & Structured Data
items: Inject BlogPosting JSON-LD schemas into all original articles
Inject Open Graph and Twitter Card tags into all original articles
